1V1，双洁。男主跟着女主在小世界里面变成boss，其他boss不是男主。
有些小世界友友觉得会踩雷不喜可跳过，前五个小世界大同小异，后面开始女主的任务就换了。
鱼咸咸原本是长白山的一条开灵智的鲤鱼，每天就想或者平躺的生活，可后面被清幽上仙看中收为徒，带回了仙界。
#仙界头条：小恶魔把帝衍打了#
现在鱼咸咸在仙界有个称号，仙送小恶魔
鱼咸咸听着不服气，她可是可可爱爱的小咸鱼耶，打了帝衍纯属意外。
玉帝竟然向师父告状！然后鱼咸咸被扔到了神主哪里，然后被神主安排到了小世界。
……
鱼咸咸在墙角瑟瑟发抖的看着坐在轮椅上的男人：“那个，小叔，咱们不合适，我和你侄子已经在一起了。”
男人眼眸半阖，嘴角上扬，低磁的声音带着一丝清冷：“分手。不分手，你腿断，还是他腿断，选一个。”
……
再一次被逼到瑟瑟发抖的鱼咸咸这一次是在屋顶上，“不是，大师你，你做啥呢？”
月光下照着男人的侧脸，挺拔的鼻子还有他那光头。
男人清冷的声音说道：“听说余施主要成亲了？不知是何人？余施主和本僧说说……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe4587817f17aa748204431c00c3b12a3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"打鸡血的扑扑","author_id":"","book_id":"7129338773216693281","book_name":"快穿：每次都要献出小腰，好累","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a04848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4810人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":89,"name":"精灵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=89&name=精灵&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7129339898548453929","read_count":"4810","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"671500"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"326","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,总裁,幻想言情,穿越,精灵,豪门世家,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4f5af83def457f8de801eb426f61ea91~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443112&x-signature=sqTqyMjdcwlJuZvnhdNrNoWzDJI%
